title: What strategies would you use to optimize database queries in an application using Spring Data JPA and Hibernate?

answers.junior: Use indexes, write efficient queries, and avoid loading unnecessary data to optimize performance.
answers.middle: Optimize queries by using fetch joins, entity graphs, and batch fetching. Monitor query logs and use indexes. Avoid N+1 problems and unnecessary data loading.
answers.senior: Use DTO projections, query optimization, and proper relationship mapping. Profile queries, monitor cache usage, and tune Hibernate settings. Always validate performance in production.
answers.tricky: Advanced strategies include custom query plans, tuning Hibernate’s cache, and using profiling tools. Monitor query execution and database statistics. Optimize entity graphs and batch operations for large datasets.
